title: clutia tomentosa
intro: Clutia tomentosa, also known as the velvet clutia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clutiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clutia tomentosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and alleviate skin conditions. Clutia tomentosa is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
